context.audience: Developers building online stores and marketplaces, agencies creating e-commerce solutions for clients, entrepreneurs launching direct-to-consumer brands with custom storefronts
pain_points: Choosing between headless commerce platforms like Shopify Hydrogen, Medusa, and Saleor
AI-generated product descriptions that are unique, SEO-friendly, and accurate
Payment processing integration across regions with proper tax handling
Performance optimization for product listing pages with many images and filters
Personalization and recommendation features powered by AI
